mapper.select: SELECT SRC_NODE_NUM||'/'||SRC_IF_NUM||'--'||DEST_NODE_NUM||'/'||DEST_IF_NUM AS LINK_ID , SRC_NODE_NUM, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_IF_NUM, SRC_IF_ID, DEST_NODE_NUM , DEST_NODE_ID, DEST_IF_NUM, DEST_IF_ID, LINK_DESC, VLAN , TAG, SRC_IP_ADDR, SRC_MAC_ADDR, DEST_IP_ADDR, DEST_MAC_ADDR , PREFIX, TOPOLOGY, BANDWIDTH, LINK_TYPE, LINK_DIV FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK WHERE (SRC_NODE_NUM = #{nodeNum} AND SRC_IF_NUM = #{ifNum}) OR (DEST_NODE_NUM = #{nodeNum} AND DEST_IF_NUM = #{ifNum})

SELECT U.NREN_ID AS LINK_ID, N.NODE_NUM, U.NODE_ID, U.NREN_NAME, U.IF_ID, P.IF_NUM FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN U LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST N ON U.NODE_ID = N.NODE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST P ON U.NODE_ID = P.NODE_ID AND U.IF_ID = P.IF_ID WHERE N.NODE_NUM = #{nodeNum} AND P.IF_NUM = #{ifNum}
